code:
%%{init: {'theme': 'dark', 'themeVariables': { 'primaryColor': '#6366f1'}}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant User as 👤 User
    participant Browser as 🌐 Browser Panel
    participant Webview as 📱 Webview
    participant Proxy as 🔍 Proxy Monitor
    participant Protocol as 📜 Protocol Handler
    participant Packet as 📦 Packet Analysis
    participant GameState as 🎮 Game State
    participant UI as 🖼️ Traffic UI
    participant Session as 📹 Session Recorder
    participant MCP as 🤖 MCP (evony-rte)
    
    Note over User,MCP: Traffic Capture Flow
    
    User->>Browser: Interact with game
    Browser->>Webview: User action
    Webview->>Proxy: HTTP/AMF Request
    
    rect rgb(30, 41, 59)
        Note over Proxy,Protocol: Request Interception
        Proxy->>Proxy: Capture headers & body
        Proxy->>Protocol: Raw packet data
        Protocol->>Protocol: Detect AMF3 format
        Protocol->>MCP: decode_packet(hexData)
        MCP-->>Protocol: Decoded structure
        Protocol->>Packet: Decoded packet
    end
    
    rect rgb(30, 58, 59)
        Note over Packet,GameState: State Extraction
        Packet->>Packet: Identify action type
        Packet->>GameState: Update game state
        GameState->>GameState: Track cities, heroes, troops
    end
    
    rect rgb(59, 30, 41)
        Note over UI,Session: UI & Recording
        Packet->>UI: Traffic entry
        UI->>UI: Add to traffic list
        UI->>UI: Update counters
        
        alt Recording Active
            Packet->>Session: Record packet
            Session->>Session: Add to session buffer
        end
    end
    
    Proxy-->>Webview: Forward request
    Webview-->>Browser: Response
    
    Note over User,MCP: Response Capture Flow
    
    Browser->>Proxy: Server response
    Proxy->>Protocol: Response packet
    Protocol->>MCP: decode_packet(hexData)
    MCP-->>Protocol: Decoded response
    Protocol->>Packet: Decoded response
    Packet->>GameState: Update state
    Packet->>UI: Response entry
    
    Note over User,MCP: Analysis Features
    
    User->>UI: Click traffic entry
    UI->>Packet: Get packet details
    Packet->>UI: JSON + Hex + Headers
    UI->>UI: Display in tabs
    
    User->>UI: Request analysis
    UI->>MCP: analyze_traffic(packets)
    MCP-->>UI: Patterns & statistics
    UI->>UI: Display analysis

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的流量捕获流程图，展示从用户操作到最终分析的整个链路。核心是要体现Proxy Monitor和MCP组件的协作关系。
明白。我先把参与者列出来：User、Browser Panel、Webview、Proxy Monitor、Protocol Handler、Packet Analysis、Game State、Traffic UI、Session Recorder，还有MCP（evony-rte）。这个顺序可以吗？
可以，MCP标注成evony-rte更清楚。流程分三大块：请求拦截、状态提取、UI展示与录制。
好的，我先画用户触发链路：User和Browser交互，Browser到Webview传递用户操作，然后Webview发HTTP/AMF Request给Proxy Monitor。
对，接下来用深色矩形框把请求拦截阶段包起来，背景色用30,41,59。里面要体现Proxy自己捕获headers和body，然后传给Protocol Handler。
画好了。Protocol Handler检测到AMF3格式后，调用MCP的decode_packet，传入hexData，MCP返回Decoded structure。
等等，Decoded structure到Packet Analysis的箭头方向对吗？应该是Protocol把解码后的包给Packet Analysis处理。
修正了，Protocol-Packet的箭头已确认方向正确。现在画第二个矩形框rgb(30,58,59)作为状态提取阶段：Packet Analysis识别action type，然后更新Game State。
Game State内部要体现跟踪cities、heroes、troops的自循环。然后第三个框用59,30,41，处理UI展示和Session录制。
第三个框画好了。Packet Analysis把流量条目给Traffic UI，UI内部做Add to traffic list和Update counters。录制部分用alt分支：Recording Active时，Packet给Session Recorder，Session内部Add to session buffer。
分支处理得很好。别忘了请求要继续转发：Proxy返回Webview，再到Browser。然后画响应捕获的Note。
加上了。响应流程：Browser把Server response给Proxy，走同样的解码链路——Protocol调MCP的decode_packet，返回Decoded response，更新Game State和UI。
最后加一块Analysis Features。用户点击traffic entry，UI向Packet Analysis要详情，返回JSON + Hex + Headers三种格式，用tab展示。
Packet到UI的返回需要虚线吗？还有用户请求分析时，UI调MCP的analyze_traffic，传入packets数组，这个理解对吗？
对，返回用虚线。MCP返回Patterns & statistics，UI展示分析结果。整个流程完整了。
全部画完了。检查一遍：三个彩色矩形框分别是请求拦截rgb(30,41,59)、状态提取rgb(30,58,59)、UI与录制rgb(59,30,41)，所有参与者都有交互，MCP的decode_packet和analyze_traffic都体现出来了。
MCP的标注确认是"🤖 MCP (evony-rte)"？还有顶部的Traffic Capture Flow和底部的Response Capture Flow、Analysis Features三个Note都齐全？
确认无误，三个Note都加了over User,MCP的范围标注，MCP显示为evony-rte。整个序列图从用户交互到流量分析形成完整闭环。
